texto: There's no master plan; I'm just going with what I'm inspired to do and what I get asked to do, and luckily the things I've been the most passionate about, I've gotten to do. And a lot of times I've gone up for movies that I didn't really care that much about, and I never got that.
explicacao: Citação de Nat Wolff sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There's no master plan; I'm just going with what I'm inspired to do and what I get asked to do, a…” articula motivacao, plan, care em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e care.

frase_original: There's no master plan; I'm just going with what I'm inspired to do and what I get asked to do, and luckily the things I've been the most passionate about, I've gotten to do. And a lot of times I've gone up for movies that I didn't really care that much about, and I never got that.

texto: Jazz is smooth and cool. Jazz is rage. Jazz flows like water. Jazz never seems to begin or end. Jazz isn't methodical, but jazz isn't messy either. Jazz is a conversation, a give and take. Jazz is the connection and communication between musicians. Jazz is abandon.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nat Wolff: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Jazz is smooth and cool. Jazz is rage. Jazz flows like water. Jazz never seems to begin or end. J…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, music, communication pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e communication.

frase_original: Jazz is smooth and cool. Jazz is rage. Jazz flows like water. Jazz never seems to begin or end. Jazz isn't methodical, but jazz isn't messy either. Jazz is a conversation, a give and take. Jazz is the connection and communication between musicians. Jazz is abandon.
